subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Fragrances of God! Verily, I read thy favored letter and was glad (to learn of) the gatherings of the friends
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذب بنفحات الله انی تلوت مکتوبک الکریم و ملئت سرورا باجتماع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
